title: Loops vs Privy (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Loops vs Privy: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Loops and Privy comes down to your specific use case. Loops is built for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails, while Privy targets Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

comparison_table.tool_a: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails
comparison_table.tool_b: Shopify Stores Wanting Email, Sms, And Popups In One Tool

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Loops wins for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails, while Privy is stronger for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Loops or Privy?
faq.a: Privy starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Privy to Loops?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
